overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a player character in a red cloak exploring a dark underground ruin featuring a massive stone serpent statue, transitioning through a pillared corridor, and emerging into a sunlit water canyon called Lilac River Cave with towering rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground hall with giant stone serpent statue

events.description: player character engages in melee combat with a humanoid enemy near the serpent statue

agents.ego_description: walking around the massive stone serpent head while holding a lantern, engaging an enemy

notable_agents.action: humanoid enemy attacking the player character near the serpent statue

entered.detail: massive moss-covered stone serpent head with circular opening in the mouth, dominating the hall
white flame braziers on ornate stone pedestals providing illumination
decorative stone balustrades lining the walkway edges
arched doorways set into the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The player explores a vast underground hall dominated by a colossal moss-covered stone serpent head. White-flame braziers cast flickering light on the ornate stone railings as the character circles the statue and fights a humanoid enemy.

scene_state.functional_zone: long pillared corridor with scattered bones

events.description: on-screen text 'A spirit summoned' appears as the player summons an ally
character transitions from walking to running through the corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through the pillared corridor, summoning a spirit ally and approaching enemies in the distance

notable_agents.action: skeletal enemy walking toward the player in the corridor

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling in repeating rows
scattered bones and skulls littering the stone floor

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a long, dimly lit corridor lined with tall stone pillars and scattered skeletal remains. After summoning a spirit ally, the character runs toward distant enemies visible near an archway at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon river with towering rock walls

events.description: abrupt transition from dark underground corridor to bright outdoor canyon with water
location text 'Lilac River Cave' appears at bottom of screen

agents.ego_description: wading through waist-deep water in the canyon, moving toward a dark cave entrance in the cliff face

entered.detail: massive vertical rock formations rising steeply from the water on both sides
calm blue water with ripples created by the character's movement
dark opening in the cliff face at water level leading to an interior space
tall rock spires floating in the misty distance against the bright sky
water cascading down the rock face into the canyon

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark corridor, the scene opens into a stunning sunlit canyon with towering rock walls and calm water. The player wades through the Lilac River Cave toward a dark cave entrance, passing beneath floating rock spires visible in the misty distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a dark, ornate underground ruin into the blinding light of a vast water canyon. It begins in a cavernous hall dominated by a colossal moss-covered stone serpent head, where white-flame braziers cast flickering light as the character engages an enemy. As the camera moves away from the statue, the scene shifts into a dimly lit corridor lined with towering stone pillars and skeletal remains, pushing forward toward a distant archway. The environment then opens abruptly from the oppressive darkness into the sunlit expanse of the Lilac River Cave, where the lighting transforms into bright daylight reflecting off calm water. Finally, the camera wades through the canyon beneath floating rock spires and towering walls before turning toward a dark cave entrance in the distance.
